Overhulse Pl at Fireweed Dr [sb], Washington 98505, USA

There is paid parking Monday thru Friday in this lot. Holidays and weekends are free parking. There are blackberries all along the sides of the parking lot, as well as along Overhulse, especially towards Evergreen Parkway. These berries tend to ripen a little

Along the Path to the Sustainable Agriculture Lab are many Evergreen Huckleberry, Vaccinium ovatum. These late fruiting hedges produce many dark blue berries into the fall. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
